title: Rich Irish Wensleydale Casserole
description: A yeasty, silky monsoon Irish dish featuring Wensleydale cheese and bacon lardons, seasoned with herbs and creamy broth for a comforting casserole.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook bacon lardons over medium heat until crispy, then transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
In the same skillet, add butter and sauté diced onion until translucent.
Stir in diced Wensleydale cheese and cook until the cheese begins to melt.
Add heavy cream and chicken broth, whisking to combine and deglaze the pan.
Season the mixture with fresh rosemary, thyme, salt, and black pepper, stirring well.
Pour the cheese mixture into a baking dish and top with the crispy bacon lardons.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with a sprinkle of fresh thyme if desired.
